name: Aiven
description: Monitor Aiven managed database services for infrastructure inventory and access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Aiven at https://console.aiven.io
2. Click your user icon → Profile
3. Go to Authentication → Tokens
4. Create a new token and enter it below

credentialFields.label: Authentication Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Aiven Console → Profile → Authentication → Tokens

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists Aiven managed database services for cloud infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Aiven account users with access to managed database services
